emails.subject: You left something behind
emails.body:
Noticed you didn't finish checkout.

No pressure. But your cart is still saved:

[CART CONTENTS]

[COMPLETE PURCHASE BUTTON]

If something went wrong with the checkout, reply and let me know. I'll fix it.

[Name]

emails.subject: Quick question about your order
emails.body:
Hey,

You started to grab [PRODUCT NAME] yesterday but didn't finish.

I'm curious: what stopped you?

- Price too high?
- Need more info about what's included?
- Technical issue with checkout?
- Just not the right time?

Reply and let me know. Happy to answer any questions.

If you're ready to continue:
[COMPLETE PURCHASE BUTTON]

[Name]

emails.subject: Last call: [PRODUCT NAME]
emails.body:
Final reminder about your cart.

[PRODUCT NAME] is still waiting, but I'm clearing abandoned carts tomorrow.

If you want it:
[COMPLETE PURCHASE BUTTON]

If not, no hard feelings. I'll remove it from your cart and you won't hear about this again.

Either way, thanks for checking it out.

[Name]

P.S. If you had questions that stopped you from buying, now's the time to ask. Reply and I'll answer before the cart clears.
